name: hormozi-scale
description: Operationalize Alex Hormozi's scaling framework — audit bottlenecks, build systems, hire correctly, and achieve 3:1 LTV:CAC before spending on paid growth. Apply the Scale Sequence (More → Better → New), Bottleneck Audit, Hiring Blueprint, and Automation Playbook to any service business, agency, or SaaS at $10k–$10M/month revenue. Commands: /hormozi-scale:scale-audit, /hormozi-scale:bottleneck-finder, /hormozi-scale:hire-next, /hormozi-scale:build-systems.

changelog.1.0.0: Initial release — Scale Sequence, Bottleneck Audit, LTV:CAC Framework, Hiring Blueprint, Systems Builder
